title: Oscar's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Baby Oscar discovers the gentle sounds of a cozy family morning, from alarm clocks to sizzling pancakes, in this sweet introduction to everyday home sounds.

pages.text: RING! RING! goes the alarm clock. Oscar opens his warm hazel eyes. Good morning, Oscar!

illustration.description: Baby Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes lying in his crib, stretching as golden morning sunlight streams through the window, wearing soft blue pajamas
illustration.alt: Baby Oscar waking up in his sunny bedroom

pages.text: CREAK goes the door. Mama comes in. 'Good morning, sweet boy!' she says softly.

illustration.description: A loving mother in cozy pajamas gently opening Oscar's bedroom door, with Oscar (short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes) sitting up in his crib reaching toward her, warm golden hour light filling the room
illustration.alt: Mama entering Oscar's room in the morning

pages.text: SIZZLE! SIZZLE! Papa makes pancakes downstairs. Oscar claps his hands. Yummy sounds!

illustration.description: Papa cooking pancakes at the stove while Oscar (short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes) sits in his high chair clapping, golden Sunday morning light streaming through kitchen windows, newspapers on counter
illustration.alt: Papa making pancakes while Oscar claps excitedly

pages.text: FLIP! goes the pancake. GIGGLE! goes Oscar. What a happy morning sound!

illustration.description: Papa flipping a pancake in the air while Oscar (short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes) laughs delightedly from his high chair, sunlit kitchen with gentle unhurried morning atmosphere
illustration.alt: Papa flipping pancakes as Oscar giggles with joy

pages.text: YUM! YUM! Oscar eats his breakfast. SLURP! goes his milk. Good morning, family!

illustration.description: The whole modern diverse family sitting around the breakfast table in pajamas, Oscar (short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes) happily eating pancakes, warm domestic scene with golden morning light and newspapers nearby
illustration.alt: Family enjoying breakfast together on a lazy morning

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound does the alarm clock make?
questions.explanation: The alarm clock goes RING! RING! to wake up Oscar in the morning.

questions.question: Who makes the pancakes?
questions.explanation: Papa makes the pancakes that go SIZZLE! SIZZLE! on the stove.

questions.question: What does Oscar do when he hears the pancake sounds?
questions.explanation: Oscar claps his hands when he hears the yummy pancake sounds!
